sections.paragraph:
ὑπωπιάζω [cp. ὑπώπιον ‘a blow in the face’]

—1. ‘strike a blow to the eye so as to injure it’, give a black eye to Lk 18:5. Some interpreters prefer metaph. wear down; but Jesus’ speech is freq. dramatic.

—2. ‘subject to bruising discipline’, in athletic imagery, train unsparingly 1 Cor 9:27.
